title: Create+ with Sinytra
description: My first modpack, based on Sinytra, Create and YUNG
body:
This pack is a **mixed modpack** with everything that I wanted to play.
This is **not only about Create**

Modpack has been tested by me with several hours of playing and it works well

Provided mods and features
- Sinytra for compatibility with Fabric modes (20-30% is Fabric)
- Create itself and other additinal content
- All YUNG's mods
- L_End and vanilla mobs
- Many new dungeons (only dungeons)
- Many mods for convenience for ALL Minecraft UI
- Combat and movement/parkour mods
- Some meme modes like PatPat or Dota

What is **not provided**
- Almost any popular optimization mod (Sodium, Distant Horizons, Lithium), because of Sinytra
- Immersive Portals, ReplayMod and like this gameplay mods, which change behaviour more deeply than any other usual mod
- Some Create addons and useful mods like AppleSkin or Continuity

This is not serious mod, if you want to (maybe you might to) help fix something here, contact with me in any way you want
